시편 59:1.content: Deliver me from my enemies, my God. Set me on high from those who rise up against me.

시편 59:2.content: Deliver me from the workers of iniquity. Save me from the bloodthirsty men.

시편 59:3.content: For, behold, they lie in wait for my soul. The mighty gather themselves together against me, not for my disobedience, nor for my sin, Yahweh.

시편 59:4.content: I have done no wrong, yet they are ready to attack me. Rise up, behold, and help me!

시편 59:5.content: You, Yahweh God of Armies, the God of Israel, rouse yourself to punish the nations. Show no mercy to the wicked traitors.

시편 59:6.content: They return at evening, howling like dogs, and prowl around the city.

시편 59:7.content: Behold, they spew with their mouth. Swords are in their lips, “For”, they say, “who hears us?”

시편 59:8.content: But you, Yahweh, laugh at them. You scoff at all the nations.

시편 59:9.content: Oh, my Strength, I watch for you, for God is my high tower.

시편 59:10.content: My God will go before me with his loving kindness. God will let me look at my enemies in triumph.

시편 59:11.content: Don’t kill them, or my people may forget. Scatter them by your power, and bring them down, Lord our shield.

시편 59:12.content: For the sin of their mouth, and the words of their lips, let them be caught in their pride, for the curses and lies which they utter.

시편 59:13.content: Consume them in wrath. Consume them, and they will be no more. Let them know that God rules in Jacob, to the ends of the earth.

시편 59:14.content: At evening let them return. Let them howl like a dog, and go around the city.

시편 59:15.content: They shall wander up and down for food, and wait all night if they aren’t satisfied.

시편 59:16.content: But I will sing of your strength. Yes, I will sing aloud of your loving kindness in the morning. For you have been my high tower, a refuge in the day of my distress.

시편 59:17.content: To you, my strength, I will sing praises. For God is my high tower, the God of my mercy.
